overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) Patient Management and Doctor Portal App for clinics and individual practitioners. It supports outpatient and inpatient workflows with role-based dashboards, clinical intelligence alerts, prescriptions, daily progress notes, handover management, appointment scheduling, and full audit trail — all synced across devices in real time.
features: Role-based dashboards for Consultant, MO, Intern, Nurse, Staff, and Admin
Full prescription & EMR with clinical intelligence and drug interaction warnings
Intern draft prescriptions with MO/Consultant approval workflow
Handover system with shift auto-detection, task carry-forward, and legal acknowledgment
Daily progress SOAP notes with auto-generated assessment and Plan→Prescription sync
Appointment booking with conflict detection and walk-in queue support
Patient portal with chat, drug reminders, vitals submission, and read receipts
Full audit trail with CSV/PDF export
AI diagnosis suggestions with confidence levels and audit logging
Real-time sync across devices with conflict resolution and sync status indicator
